skillTree.localised_description: The turbulent Winds of Magic can do little harm to those who have found harmony amidst its raging currents.

effects.description: Spell resistance: 20%

skillTree.localised_description: The best way to repel the chaotic flurry of missile fire is to meet it with order, discipline, and a stalwart row of shields.

skillTree.localised_description: Western Cathay’s far-flung deserts gave Bhashiva's ancestral line a place to hone its ways and bring forth the world’s most resilient desert warrior.

skillTree.localised_description: The White Tiger revels in endlessly stalking her prey, despite it being a long, drawn-out process of studying weakness only bearing fruit at the final pounce.

effects.description: Replaces: "Hidden Huntress"

skillTree.localised_description: When a hunter cannot help but hate their prey, extra effort must be taken to centre one’s soul and ensure the kill is righteous.

skillTree.localised_description: Hand-to-hand combat is a lethal match of cut and thrust. However, it’s not all about offensive strikes; parries and other defensive moves can also win the day.

skillTree.localised_description: Such is their power and ferocity, a wound-maker will ravage the foe, cutting and pulverising until there is only one exit - death.

skillTree.localised_description: This warrior is one with their blade; it is an extension of their will, making them a worthy foe in combat.

attributes.bullet_text: Entities with this attribute double their charge bonus when attacking the rear or flank of an entity.
This unit provides a leadership bonus to nearby allies. Units within range of both the Lord's aura and an encouraging unit will receive the larger of the two bonuses.
This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.
This unit can move hidden in any terrain.
Speed and combat penalties caused by terrain are ignored by this unit.

A Tiger Warrior unit has:
	 ➕ Increased  Speed
	 ➕ Increased  Charge Bonus
	 ➕ Ferocious Ambush ability

factionEffects.localised_description: In the Iron Dragon’s domain, the brightest and best invariably find their way into his service. Bhashiva, leader of the legendary Tiger Warriors and their Court, serves as one of the eight Lords of Shang-Yang.

items.colour_text: This ornate set of katara was crafted for the first White Tiger on the order of the Iron Dragon himself, in gratitude for services to Shang-Yang.

effects.description: Melee attack: +10
Weapon strength: +15%
Fire resistance: 30%
Ability: "Blades of Shang-Yang"

items.colour_text: This magical broach was brought to Shang-Yang by traders many centuries ago from an unknown land, its great power destined for warriors of great cause.
